betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Magnetized Tungsten§f

§aA tungsten-schrabidium superalloy with exceptional durability, conductivity, and heat resistance!§f

§bMagnetized Tungsten§f is a tungsten alloy with trace amounts of schrabidium-326. The added schrabidium greatly enhances durability, conductivity, heat resistance, and magnetism. It appears lighter than normal tungsten with striped patterns.

§6Production§f:
§b• Blast Furnace§f — 1 Tungsten Ingot + 1 Schrabidium Nugget → 1 Magnetized Tungsten Ingot
§b• Crucible§f — 8 Tungsten Nuggets + 1 Schrabidium Nugget → 1 Ingot (more efficient)

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• CMB Steel§f — crucible: 6 Magnetized Tungsten Nuggets + 3 Poisonous Mud Nuggets → 1 CMB Steel Ingot
§b• Superconductors§f — extremely high-temperature (4,000K), late-game equivalent of advanced alloy
§b• Energy Powder§f — Glowstone + Diamond Powder + Magnetized Tungsten Powder
§b• N Mine§f — anti-personnel mine
§b• Contained Counter-Resonant Singularity§f — DFC component

§eTip§f: Magnetized Tungsten is the §egate§f to CMB Steel. You need schrabidium first, so don't skip the schrabidium processing chain!
